login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Enter your phone number to continue

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start your journey as a Teeko driver-partner
register.pdpaConsent: I consent to the collection and use of my personal data in accordance with Malaysia's PDPA 2010 for the purpose of driver onboarding and regulatory compliance.

agreement.title: Driver Agreement
agreement.subtitle: Please read the full agreement before proceeding
agreement.scrollPrompt: Scroll to the bottom to enable acceptance
agreement.acceptLabel: I have read and agree to the Teeko Driver-Partner Agreement and Terms of Service

personalDocs.title: Personal Documents
personalDocs.subtitle: Upload clear photos or scans of the following documents

vehicleDetails.title: Vehicle Details
vehicleDetails.subtitle: Enter the details of the vehicle you will use for e-hailing
vehicleDetails.ageNote: Only vehicles manufactured within the last 15 years are accepted

vehicleDocs.title: Vehicle Documents
vehicleDocs.subtitle: Upload valid documents for your registered vehicle

confirmation.title: Application Submitted!
confirmation.subtitle: Thank you for registering as a Teeko driver-partner
confirmation.step1Desc: Our team will review your documents within 1–3 working days
confirmation.step2Desc: We submit your EVP application to APAD/LPKP — approval takes 5–7 working days
confirmation.step3Desc: You'll be notified to download the Teeko Driver app and start earning
confirmation.downloadSubtitle: Download the app now — you'll be able to go online once your account is activated

dashboard.title: Application Status
dashboard.subtitle: Track your onboarding progress
dashboard.downloadBanner: Your account is activated — download the Teeko Driver app to start earning

documents.dragDrop: Drag & drop or click to upload
documents.fileTypes: JPG, PNG or PDF · Max 10 MB
documents.typeError: Only JPG, PNG, or PDF files are accepted
